resolution_steps: Enable rate limiting and geo block if approved.
Notify SecOps and application owner.
Scale edge protection per runbook.

tickets.title: Intermittent packet loss to datacenter — Deepak (Network) resolved
tickets.description: Ping loss 9% to primary datacenter during business hours.
resolution_steps: Collect traceroute from affected sites.
Check ISP circuit utilization and errors.
Schedule maintenance if core switch port errors rise.

Reinstall VPN client with latest package.
Verify UDP 500/4500 not blocked on local network.
